scenarios.title: Live route caps body size (413) through the real cmd/core wiring
scenarios.linkedDoD: Scope 1 DoD: live POST /api/assistant/turn returns 413 for an over-cap body with no facade call, bounded read — Scenario 'BUG-069-001-SCN-001 Live route caps body size (413) through the real cmd/core wiring'.

scenarios.title: Live route rate-limits per user (429) through the real wiring
scenarios.linkedDoD: Scope 1 DoD: per-user budget exceeded yields 429 with no facade call, keyed per user — Scenario 'BUG-069-001-SCN-002 Live route rate-limits per user (429) through the real wiring'.

scenarios.title: Live route enforces the assistant:turn scope-claim gate (403) for per-user PASETO
evidenceRefs: internal/auth/scope_middleware.go:44 (RequireScope — currently unwired into the live route)
scenarios.linkedDoD: Scope 1 DoD: per-user PASETO session without assistant:turn yields 403, no facade call — Scenario 'BUG-069-001-SCN-003 Live route enforces the assistant:turn scope-claim gate (403) for per-user PASETO'.

scenarios.title: Dev shared-token still passes after the fix (no regression)
scenarios.linkedDoD: Scope 1 DoD: SessionSourceSharedToken within limits reaches the facade with a normal v1 success envelope — Scenario 'BUG-069-001-SCN-004 Dev shared-token still passes after the fix (no regression)'.

scenarios.title: Adversarial — the regression test FAILS against the identity-wrapper wiring and PASSES after the swap

linkedTests.function: RED before swap (SetMiddleware identity pass-through) -> 413/429/403 assertions FAIL; GREEN after swap (SetMiddleware PreFacadeChain(transportCfg)) -> PASS

evidenceRefs: report.md (RED run captured against the identity-wrapper wiring)
report.md (GREEN run captured after the PreFacadeChain swap)
grep -rn 'PreFacadeChain' cmd/ internal/api/ (>= 1 production match after fix)
scenarios.linkedDoD: Scope 1 DoD: pre-fix RED proof (identity wrapper) + post-fix GREEN proof (PreFacadeChain) — Scenario 'BUG-069-001-SCN-005 Adversarial — the regression test FAILS against the identity-wrapper wiring and PASSES after the swap'.
